Financial Planning & ControllingLap ke hoach & kiem soat tai chinh
  • Built short-term (1-year) and long-term (5-year) financial plans based on the sales pipeline, product roadmap, and market trends.Xay dung ke hoach tai chinh ngan han (1 nam) va dai han (5 nam) dua tren pipeline ban hang, ke hoach san pham va xu huong thi truong.
  • Worked directly with the CEO and department heads to monitor financial performance and proactively recommend plan adjustments in response to changes in business conditions.Phoi hop truc tiep voi CEO va cac truong bo phan de giam sat hieu qua tai chinh va de xuat dieu chinh ke hoach kip thoi.
Performance Tracking & Investment Analysis (Wavemaker & NextPay)Theo doi & Phan tich dau tu (Wavemaker & NextPay)
  • Built dashboards to track key financial and operating metrics, including revenue growth, churn rate, burn rate, and cash runway, to support strategic decision-making.Xay dung dashboard theo doi cac chi so tai chinh va van hanh (doanh thu, churn rate, burn rate, runway) ho tro ra quyet dinh chien luoc.
  • Conducted ROI analysis for marketing and product development initiatives to support management decisions.Thuc hien phan tich ROI cho cac hoat dong marketing va phat trien san pham.

Cross-functional SupportHo tro lien phong ban
  • Product: forecasted development costs and timelines.Product: du bao chi phi va tien do phat trien.
  • Marketing & Sales: assessed campaign performance and ROI.Marketing & Sales: danh gia hieu qua chien dich va ROI.
  • Customer Success: analyzed customer retention and upsell behavior.Cham soc khach hang: phan tich hanh vi giu chan va upsell khach hang.
  • Accounting: ensured financial data accuracy across FS, cash runway, and internal reporting.Ke toan: dam bao du lieu tai chinh luon chinh xac (FS, Runway, bao cao noi bo).
ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Leader
  • Built the Information Security Management System (ISMS) in compliance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022, including policies and frameworks, Statement of Applicability (SoA), and information security risk management framework.Xay dung he thong ISMS (Information Security Management System) theo tieu chuan ISO/IEC bao gom chinh sach, SoA va khung quan tri rui ro an toan thong tin.
